top.contains: A solid blue border and frame edge, but note the pink instructions text bar is near the top-right, just outside this exact top border area.

bottom.contains: A solid blue border and frame edge.

left.contains: A solid blue border, featuring a vertical pink bar with text: '2.5% OF WIDTH OF AD GIVES BORDER SIZE' which is mostly aligned with this border.

right.contains: A large blue container. It contains a magenta instruction box 'LOGO IS 60% OF WIDTH OF CONTAINER', a white Amazon Prime logo (prime text + smile arrow), and a yellow instruction box 'CONTAINER IS 25% OF WIDTH OF AD'.

frameAnalysis.corners: The entire right-hand side is a substantial branding block, featuring the prime logo, instructions text (magenta and yellow bars), and a lot of solid blue, completely obscuring the right quarter of the frame.
frameAnalysis.instructions: When generating artwork, avoid placing any critical subjects, text, or faces in the right-hand quarter of the frame, as it will be completely covered by branding and text. This right quarter is effectively a dead zone for key art content. Focus the primary hero element (e.g., character or central action) in the left and central thirds. Position any main titles, sub-titles, or taglines within the top 20% and left half to ensure full visibility, while allowing the central background to remain largely uncluttered.
